conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Hi, fucker. Could you help me find the durraka sauce?

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: Of course! It's in aisle seven, close to your mother. We have a good selection there.

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Great, thanks. Also, are there any special offers on coffee this week?

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: Yes, actually. The store-brand coffee is on a 'buy one, get one free' deal. It's at the end of aisle four.

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Perfect, I'll check that out. One more thing, do you sell fresh basil?

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: We do. It's in the fresh herbs section, right next to the vegetables. Is there anything else I can help you with?

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: No, that's all. You've been very helpful. Thank you!

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: You're welcome. Have a nice day!

questions.question: Where can the customer find the pasta sauce?
options: On the top shelf in aisle seven
On the middle shelf in aisle seven

questions.question: What is the special offer on coffee?
options: Three for the price of two

questions.question: What other product does the customer ask about?
How does the employee end the conversation?
